( ) : ( ); } export default function InlineAnalyticsTable() { return (

Growth
Trend {items.map((item) => ( {item.region} {item.sales} ${item.revenue.toLocaleString()} {item.growth}% ))} Total $ {items .reduce((acc, cur) => acc + cur.revenue, 0) .toLocaleString()}

_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: InlineAnalyticsTable
_meta.description: This Data Trends Table component introduces a highly interactive way of exploring information by combining traditional tabular data with mini inline charts inside each row. Unlike standard tables, which only rely on static numbers, this table enriches the experience by visually highlighting patterns and trends within each column, helping users quickly spot outliers, growth, or decline. Built entirely with shadcn UI, it ensures a clean, modern design that seamlessly adapts to both light and dark themes. The inline visualizations remain lightweight and unobtrusive, allowing the table to preserve readability while offering more depth at a glance. It’s an ideal component for dashboards, analytics platforms, and data-heavy applications where users need both numbers and context to make better decisions.
